---
title: "Contact"
---

I welcome inquiries about research collaborations, OpenSees/GPU workflows, and graduate opportunities in structural and earthquake engineering.

## Email

**Academic:** [garaujor@stanford.edu](mailto:garaujor@stanford.edu)

## Affiliation

Gustavo A. Araújo R.  
PhD Candidate, Civil & Environmental Engineering  
John A. Blume Earthquake Engineering Center  
Stanford University  
Stanford, CA 94305

## Online

| Platform | Link |
|----------|------|
| Website | [gaaraujo.github.io](https://gaaraujo.github.io) |
| Stanford Profile | [profiles.stanford.edu/gustavo-a-araujo](https://profiles.stanford.edu/gustavo-a-araujo) |
| Google Scholar | [scholar.google.com/citations?user=rrMcW-UAAAAJ](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=rrMcW-UAAAAJ) |
| ResearchGate | [researchgate.net/profile/Gustavo-Araujo-R](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gustavo-Araujo-R) |
| ORCID | [orcid.org/0000-0002-5543-8101](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5543-8101) |
| GitHub | [github.com/gaaraujo](https://github.com/gaaraujo) |
| LinkedIn | [linkedin.com/in/araujorg](https://www.linkedin.com/in/araujorg/) |
| Goosefolio (Instagram) | [instagram.com/goosefolio](https://www.instagram.com/goosefolio/) — hobby photo account |

## Media

Featured video and press items are on [About](about.qmd#media-profiles).

## Office Hours

Office hours are not listed publicly. Please email to schedule a meeting.
